text: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
And He found you lost and guided you.
So verily, with hardship, there is relief.
Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.
arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا

text: And whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be enough for them.
arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ

text: My mercy encompasses all things.
Remember Me, and I will remember you.
And We have certainly made the Quran easy to remember. So is there anyone who will be mindful?
arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

text: Whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while being a believer — those will enter Paradise.
And speak to people good words.
Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
He is with you wherever you are.
And your Lord says, Call upon Me; I will respond to you.
Do not lose hope in the mercy of Allah.
Whoever kills a soul — it is as if he had slain all mankind. And whoever saves one — it is as if he had saved all mankind.
The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers.
O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another.
Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you.
And do good; indeed, Allah loves the doers of good.
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
Read! In the name of your Lord who created.
And We have certainly honored the children of Adam.
Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth.
And in the earth are signs for those who have certainty.
Among His Signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth, and the diversity of your languages and colors.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
And the servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them, they say words of peace.
And We send down of the Quran that which is healing and mercy for the believers.
Allah is the ally of those who believe. He brings them out from darknesses into the light.
And hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together and do not become divided.
arabic: وَاعْتَصِمُوا بِحَبْلِ اللَّهِ جَمِيعًا وَلَا تَفَرَّقُوا

text: He knows what is in every heart.
And be patient, for indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.
And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all in an orbit are swimming.
The example of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is like a seed of grain that sprouts seven ears; in every ear there are a hundred grains.
And say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you.
And whoever fears Allah — He will make for him a way out.
arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا

text: And to Allah belongs the east and the west. So wherever you turn, there is the Face of Allah.
We have created man in the best of forms.
arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ فِي أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ

text: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them.
Those who believe and do righteous deeds — for them is forgiveness and great reward.
Every soul will taste death. And you will only be given your full compensation on the Day of Resurrection.
And We created you in pairs.
And He is with you wherever you are. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
Then do you wonder that a reminder has come to you from your Lord through a man from among you?
And when My servants ask you concerning Me — indeed I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.
And We have already created man and We know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than his jugular vein.
So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth.
There shall be no compulsion in religion. The right course has become clear from the wrong.
Repel evil by that which is better, and thereupon the one whom between you and him is enmity will become as though he was a devoted friend.
